title: Built for Verifiable Play
intro: CodeCroupier was built by a small team of protocol engineers who were tired of casino platforms that ask players to simply trust a server no one can see.
Since our first prototype, we've focused on one idea: every game mechanic that touches your funds should be something you — or anyone — can independently verify on-chain.
quote: Our mission is to bring verifiable, on-chain game logic to every player, not just the ones who know how to read a smart contract.
visionTitle: Shaping the Future of On-Chain Play
visionParagraphs: Our vision is to make provably-fair, on-chain gaming simple and accessible for every player — without requiring a computer science degree to trust it.
We want to give players tools to verify outcomes themselves, not just take our word for it.
